hypothesis_en: Ladies and gentlemen, the session is resumed. Please take a seat to know the outcome of the vote to establish the order of precedence of the Vice-Presidents. The result is as follows: number of voters: 691. Three blank ballots or zeroes twenty-six votes cast six hundred and sixty-seven the vice-presidents have obtained the following results Mr. Alejo Vidal Cuadras two hundred and eighty-seven votes Mr. Antonio Trakatelis Mrs. Dagmar Rochberent two hundred and forty-four Mr. Edward Macmillan Scott two hundred and forty-one Ingo Friedrich two hundred and thirty-two Mario Mauro two hundred and twenty-nine Antonio The first is Luigi Cosilovo, the second is Jasek Emil Sarjus, the third is Wolski, the fourth is Pierre Moscovici, the fourth is Janusz Onyszkiewicz, the seventy-seventh is Gerard Honesta, the sixtieth is Silvia Yvonne Kaufmann. In accordance with Article 2 of the Regulation, the order of precedence of the Vice-Presidents shall be determined by the number of votes obtained. I propose that the deadline for submission of applications expires tomorrow, Wednesday, at 9 a.m. Applications must be submitted to the Deputy Secretary-General at the R 0101 office of the Louis Weich building.
